evals.name: virtual-thread-migration
evals.prompt: Redesign a Java 21 batch processor around virtual threads and call out ThreadLocal, carrier-thread, and connection-pool risks.

evals.name: jvm-diagnostics
evals.prompt: A service has heap growth and p99 spikes. Explain the smallest JVM-level diagnosis plan using thread dumps, GC logs, or histograms.

evals.name: benchmark-design
evals.prompt: Propose the first JMH benchmark for a serialization hot path and mention dead-code elimination or warmup hygiene.

evals.name: runtime-packaging
evals.prompt: Compare HotSpot, CDS/AppCDS, and native image for a startup-sensitive CLI with reflection-heavy libraries.

evals.name: choose-concurrency-model
evals.prompt: Choose between virtual threads, CompletableFuture, and a fixed worker pool for a blocking I/O-heavy Java event consumer.
